examples: I'm skipping down a little bit, glum and intense, at the neck of the woman across from him.
The players sat there with glum looks on their faces.
She was very glum and was obviously missing her children.
However, the first thing you notice is that they look glum, bored or detached.
In public, she appears sensible, pragmatic, occasionally glum-looking, ever careful not to cause offence.
